item.title: File Recovery Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: File Recovery Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
File Recovery Free
(Utilities)
Freeware file recovery software is non destructive read only utility that offers an easy recovery of lost or accidently erased music files and digital images from corrupted digital media storage device. Reliable data salvage utility supports easy retrieval of multimedia files, text documents and other important data from all fixed and removable storage device like Memory card, Memory stick, Flash drive, Floppy disk, Media player, Pen drive, USB drive etc. Music file recovery program rescue all your favorite audio songs, video albums, digital photos, snaps and other media files missing or misplaced from formatted hard disk drives. Data Recovery Software provides streamlined graphical interface and does not require any prior technical knowledge to operate the application. Powerful files rescue tool works smoothly on all Windows OS platforms and a profitable solution for all common storage devices. Easy to use files restoration program has inbuilt search module to retrieve recoverable files and folders from all corrupted, damaged or infected disk drives. Features: * Data retrieval utility can be easily installed on the machines having Windows operating system and offers reliable solution in minimal time. * Software for file recovery is equipped with many advanced features and has ability to recover data of those removable media that have lost their files while running on Linux or MAC OS. * Free data rescue application is capable to restore deleted files from inaccessible drives or when machine displays Drive not formatted or Drive not recognized messages. * Quick files salvage program easily recovers all missed data and maintains your drive structure and saves the recovered data at user specified location.

[read more]
item.description:
File Recovery Free
(Utilities)
Freeware file recovery software is non destructive read only utility that offers an easy recovery of lost or accidently erased music files and digital images from corrupted digital media storage device. Reliable data salvage utility supports easy retrieval of multimedia files, text documents and other important data from all fixed and removable storage device like Memory card, Memory stick, Flash drive, Floppy disk, Media player, Pen drive, USB drive etc. Music file recovery program rescue all your favorite audio songs, video albums, digital photos, snaps and other media files missing or misplaced from formatted hard disk drives. Data Recovery Software provides streamlined graphical interface and does not require any prior technical knowledge to operate the application. Powerful files rescue tool works smoothly on all Windows OS platforms and a profitable solution for all common storage devices. Easy to use files restoration program has inbuilt search module to retrieve recoverable files and folders from all corrupted, damaged or infected disk drives. Features: * Data retrieval utility can be easily installed on the machines having Windows operating system and offers reliable solution in minimal time. * Software for file recovery is equipped with many advanced features and has ability to recover data of those removable media that have lost their files while running on Linux or MAC OS. * Free data rescue application is capable to restore deleted files from inaccessible drives or when machine displays Drive not formatted or Drive not recognized messages. * Quick files salvage program easily recovers all missed data and maintains your drive structure and saves the recovered data at user specified location.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
File Recovery Free
(Utilities)
Freeware file recovery software is non destructive read only utility that offers an easy recovery of lost or accidently erased music files and digital images from corrupted digital media storage device. Reliable data salvage utility supports easy retrieval of multimedia files, text documents and other important data from all fixed and removable storage device like Memory card, Memory stick, Flash drive, Floppy disk, Media player, Pen drive, USB drive etc. Music file recovery program rescue all your favorite audio songs, video albums, digital photos, snaps and other media files missing or misplaced from formatted hard disk drives. Data Recovery Software provides streamlined graphical interface and does not require any prior technical knowledge to operate the application. Powerful files rescue tool works smoothly on all Windows OS platforms and a profitable solution for all common storage devices. Easy to use files restoration program has inbuilt search module to retrieve recoverable files and folders from all corrupted, damaged or infected disk drives. Features: * Data retrieval utility can be easily installed on the machines having Windows operating system and offers reliable solution in minimal time. * Software for file recovery is equipped with many advanced features and has ability to recover data of those removable media that have lost their files while running on Linux or MAC OS. * Free data rescue application is capable to restore deleted files from inaccessible drives or when machine displays Drive not formatted or Drive not recognized messages. * Quick files salvage program easily recovers all missed data and maintains your drive structure and saves the recovered data at user specified location.

[read more]

item.title: Download EspacioAPK Free Download - Latest Version 2024 App [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Download EspacioAPK Free Download - Latest Version 2024 App [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: dfgdf5
item.itunes:summary:
Download EspacioAPK Free Download - Latest Version 2024 App
(Various Games)
Welcome gamers to a new thrilling adventure! In the vast world of mobile gaming, there's a new name grabbing the attention of the gaming community - it's none other than Espacio APK 1.0. Let's delve deep into the unique experience of this game.
Graphics and Sound
Espacio isn't just an ordinary puzzle game; it's a masterpiece of graphics. With beautiful, vibrant colors and eye-catching graphics, the game is a visual treat. The lively sound effects and captivating music further enhance the appeal of the game, immersing players right from the first seconds.

Storyline and Gameplay
With a complex and engaging storyline, Espacio isn't just a regular puzzle game; it's a true adventure. Players step into the shoes of the protagonist, an extraordinary explorer, embarking on a journey to explore the vast universe. From distant planets to large galaxies, each place holds secrets and surprises.
[read more]

item.title: Rabbit R1 APK 1.0 Download Free App For Android Version [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Rabbit R1 APK 1.0 Download Free App For Android Version [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: dfgdf5
item.itunes:summary:
Rabbit R1 APK 1.0 Download Free App For Android Version
(Various Games)
Unlock a world of entertainment with Rabbit R1 APK 1.0! This versatile application brings a plethora of features to your Android device, allowing you to stream movies, TV shows, music, and much more with ease. Dive into your favorite content, whether it's the latest blockbuster movies or trending TV series, all conveniently accessible at your fingertips. Rabbit R1 APK 1.0 offers seamless navigation and a user-friendly interface, ensuring a hassle-free experience every time. Don't miss out on endless entertainment—download Rabbit R1 APK 1.0 now and elevate your digital entertainment experience!

item.title: Tag After School APK 9.0 Download For Android Latest Version [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Tag After School APK 9.0 Download For Android Latest Version [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: fgcfgb4
item.itunes:summary:
Tag After School APK 9.0 Download For Android Latest Version
(Various Games)
Hello dear readers! Today, let's explore together a brand new and exciting game - Tag After School APK 9.0. Developed by the talented team at [developer's name], this game promises to bring players high-quality experiences and wonderful moments of relaxation after tense hours of study.
Key Features:

Vibrant Graphics:
Tag After School APK 9.0 impresses players from the first glance with its vibrant graphics, eye-catching colors, and incredibly adorable characters. From expansive school grounds to colorful classrooms, every scene in the game is faithfully reproduced, creating a feeling as if players are living in a wonderful parallel world.
Captivating Storyline:
A special feature of Tag After School APK 9.0 is its deep and captivating storyline. Players will take on the role of the main character, a new student at the school, and uncover the secrets hidden behind the school walls. From learning about the teachers' secrets to making friends, building relationships, and solving mysteries, players will be immersed in a dramatic and surprising story.
[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: iQPuzzle [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: iQPuzzle [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ElThoro
item.itunes:summary:
iQPuzzle
(Various Games)
iQPuzzle is a diverting I.Q. challenging puzzle. Pentominos are used as puzzle pieces and more than 300 different board shapes are available, which have to be filled with them.
[list]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/iqpuzzle/releases/latest]Windows, AppImage, ReactOS, macOS[/url]
[*] [url=https://flathub.org/apps/details/com.github.elth0r0.iqpuzzle]Flatpak[/url]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/iqpuzzle]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=iqpuzzle]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/iqpuzzle/]Arch AUR[/url]
[*] [url=https://madb.mageia.org/package/show/name/iqpuzzle/release/cauldron/application/0]Mageia Cauldron[/url]
[*] [url=http://www.ecsoft2.org/iqpuzzle]Build for OS/2[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/mrbitt/mrbit-overlay/tree/master/games-puzzle/iqpuzzle]Gentoo ebuild[/url]
[*] [url=https://www.freshports.org/games/iqpuzzle]FreeBSD Ports[/url] / [url=https://repology.org/repository/dports]DPorts[/url]
[/list]
Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/iqpuzzle/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]

iQPuzzle
(Various Games)
iQPuzzle is a diverting I.Q. challenging puzzle. Pentominos are used as puzzle pieces and more than 300 different board shapes are available, which have to be filled with them.

Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/iqpuzzle/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.

item.title: Digital Camera Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Data Doctor Digital Camera image restoration software restores erased audio video clips, photographs and previously saved albums from formatted digital cameras multimedia card. Recovery software recovers JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIF, TIFF, AVI, MOV, PNG, BMP, MIDI and WAV image files from digital camera memory card. How to retrieve digital camera deleted photo? Digital camera picture rescue utility supports various digital cameras like Konica, Samsung, Toshiba, Panasonic, Canon, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji, FujiFilm, LG, Lexar, HP, Casio, Agfa, Polaroid, Yashica, Kinon, Olympus, Sony, NEC, Imation, Sanyo, Kyocera, SanDisk, Epson, IBM, Minolta, Argus, Sharp, Goldstar, Mitsubishi, JVC, Leica, Chinon, Vivitar, Phillips, Ricoh, Hitachi, Pentax and Verbatim. Digital camera snap salvage tool supports various digital cameras RAW format like Kodak DCR, Nikon NEF, Canon CRW, Fuji RAF and Minolta MRW. Retrieval tool supports windows operating system like windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.Features:* Recovery software recovers deleted files like jpg, jpeg, wav, gif, bmp, midi, riff and tiff form digital camera.* Digital camera image rescue utility has read only permission so it does not affect other files in the disk.* Recovery software can recovers data even memory card is pulled out while digital camera was ON.* Digital camera picture recovery software is GUI (Graphical User Interface) based so it is easy to use.* Recovery tools undelete lost files even disk is affected from virus.*For assistance of user rescue software provides help manual to use the software easily.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Data Doctor Digital Camera image restoration software restores erased audio video clips, photographs and previously saved albums from formatted digital cameras multimedia card. Recovery software recovers JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIF, TIFF, AVI, MOV, PNG, BMP, MIDI and WAV image files from digital camera memory card. How to retrieve digital camera deleted photo? Digital camera picture rescue utility supports various digital cameras like Konica, Samsung, Toshiba, Panasonic, Canon, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji, FujiFilm, LG, Lexar, HP, Casio, Agfa, Polaroid, Yashica, Kinon, Olympus, Sony, NEC, Imation, Sanyo, Kyocera, SanDisk, Epson, IBM, Minolta, Argus, Sharp, Goldstar, Mitsubishi, JVC, Leica, Chinon, Vivitar, Phillips, Ricoh, Hitachi, Pentax and Verbatim. Retrieval tool supports windows operating system like windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.Features:* Recovery software recovers deleted files like jpg, jpeg, wav, gif, bmp, midi, riff and tiff form digital camera.* Digital camera image rescue utility has read only permission so it does not affect other files in the disk.* Recovery software can recovers data even memory card is pulled out while digital camera was ON.* Digital camera picture recovery software is GUI (Graphical User Interface) based so it is easy to use.* Recovery tools undelete lost files even disk is affected from virus.*For assistance of user rescue software provides help manual to use the software easily.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Data Doctor Digital Camera image restoration software restores erased audio video clips, photographs and previously saved albums from formatted digital cameras multimedia card. Recovery software recovers JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIF, TIFF, AVI, MOV, PNG, BMP, MIDI and WAV image files from digital camera memory card. How to retrieve digital camera deleted photo? Digital camera picture rescue utility supports various digital cameras like Konica, Samsung, Toshiba, Panasonic, Canon, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji, FujiFilm, LG, Lexar, HP, Casio, Agfa, Polaroid, Yashica, Kinon, Olympus, Sony, NEC, Imation, Sanyo, Kyocera, SanDisk, Epson, IBM, Minolta, Argus, Sharp, Goldstar, Mitsubishi, JVC, Leica, Chinon, Vivitar, Phillips, Ricoh, Hitachi, Pentax and Verbatim. Retrieval tool supports windows operating system like windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.Features:* Recovery software recovers deleted files like jpg, jpeg, wav, gif, bmp, midi, riff and tiff form digital camera.* Digital camera image rescue utility has read only permission so it does not affect other files in the disk.* Recovery software can recovers data even memory card is pulled out while digital camera was ON.* Digital camera picture recovery software is GUI (Graphical User Interface) based so it is easy to use.* Recovery tools undelete lost files even disk is affected from virus.*For assistance of user rescue software provides help manual to use the software easily.

[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Memory card files recovery software restore lost, missing, crashed files and folders from memory card digital storage media. MMC card data recovery utility support recovery from all type of USB storage media of all capacities including 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. Flash memory card data recovery application recovers lost, deleted pictures, images, audio, video songs from corrupted SDHC memory cards. Smart media files backup software retrieve data even when error messages like Drive not formatted is displayed on the screen while accessing the memory card. Memory card data recovery software support to all memory card manufacturers including Kodak, Nikon, Canon, SanDisk, Casio, Sony and Kingston etc. XD Memory card photo rescue tool bring back files deleted using (shift+delete) command or lost due to formatted memory card. Flash memory card files retrieval utility is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 operating system.Software provides user friendly interface to easily understand working of multimedia storage card. Tool recover data in case file not formatted or disk not accessible error message is displayed while accessing multimedia card on your PC or Laptop Desktop system. Memory card files recovery software provides preview of all recovered files and folders before actual recovery.Features: *Memory card data recovery software recovers lost data even after logical corruption and accidental deletion from memory card storage device. * Software supports all major USB memory card reader. * Utility support various memory card storage drives such as 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. *Software is designed with interactive graphical user interface that helps user in most efficient way.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Memory card files recovery software restore lost, missing, crashed files and folders from memory card digital storage media. MMC card data recovery utility support recovery from all type of USB storage media of all capacities including 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. Flash memory card data recovery application recovers lost, deleted pictures, images, audio, video songs from corrupted SDHC memory cards. Smart media files backup software retrieve data even when error messages like Drive not formatted is displayed on the screen while accessing the memory card. Memory card data recovery software support to all memory card manufacturers including Kodak, Nikon, Canon, SanDisk, Casio, Sony and Kingston etc. XD Memory card photo rescue tool bring back files deleted using (shift+delete) command or lost due to formatted memory card. Flash memory card files retrieval utility is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 operating system.Software provides user friendly interface to easily understand working of multimedia storage card. Tool recover data in case file not formatted or disk not accessible error message is displayed while accessing multimedia card on your PC or Laptop Desktop system. Memory card files recovery software provides preview of all recovered files and folders before actual recovery.Features: *Memory card data recovery software recovers lost data even after logical corruption and accidental deletion from memory card storage device. * Software supports all major USB memory card reader. * Utility support various memory card storage drives such as 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. *Software is designed with interactive graphical user interface that helps user in most efficient way.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Memory Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Memory card files recovery software restore lost, missing, crashed files and folders from memory card digital storage media. MMC card data recovery utility support recovery from all type of USB storage media of all capacities including 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. Flash memory card data recovery application recovers lost, deleted pictures, images, audio, video songs from corrupted SDHC memory cards. Smart media files backup software retrieve data even when error messages like Drive not formatted is displayed on the screen while accessing the memory card. Memory card data recovery software support to all memory card manufacturers including Kodak, Nikon, Canon, SanDisk, Casio, Sony and Kingston etc. XD Memory card photo rescue tool bring back files deleted using (shift+delete) command or lost due to formatted memory card. Flash memory card files retrieval utility is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 operating system.Software provides user friendly interface to easily understand working of multimedia storage card. Tool recover data in case file not formatted or disk not accessible error message is displayed while accessing multimedia card on your PC or Laptop Desktop system. Memory card files recovery software provides preview of all recovered files and folders before actual recovery.Features: *Memory card data recovery software recovers lost data even after logical corruption and accidental deletion from memory card storage device. * Software supports all major USB memory card reader. * Utility support various memory card storage drives such as 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. *Software is designed with interactive graphical user interface that helps user in most efficient way.

[read more]

item.title: Softaken Merge Vcard Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken Merge Vcard Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: fileconversion
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken Merge Vcard Tool
(Utilities)
Utilize the Softaken Merge VCF Tool to quickly and effortlessly combine multiple VCF contacts into one. Users can utilize this software on any Windows OS version, whether it's the latest or the oldest. There are users who can select up to multiple VCF contacts at one time. There is no need to download multiple tools to combine VCF contacts. Both technical and non-technical users can also use the tool to consolidate VCF contacts. There is no need for technical knowledge to join VCF contacts. Get the latest free trial edition of this software to learn more about its features.
Read More: https://www.softaken.com/merge-vcard-pro
[read more]
item.description:
Softaken Merge Vcard Tool
(Utilities)
Utilize the Softaken Merge VCF Tool to quickly and effortlessly combine multiple VCF contacts into one. Users can utilize this software on any Windows OS version, whether it's the latest or the oldest. There are users who can select up to multiple VCF contacts at one time. There is no need to download multiple tools to combine VCF contacts. Both technical and non-technical users can also use the tool to consolidate VCF contacts. There is no need for technical knowledge to join VCF contacts. Get the latest free trial edition of this software to learn more about its features.
Read More: https://www.softaken.com/merge-vcard-pro
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Softaken Merge Vcard Tool
(Utilities)
Utilize the Softaken Merge VCF Tool to quickly and effortlessly combine multiple VCF contacts into one. Users can utilize this software on any Windows OS version, whether it's the latest or the oldest. There are users who can select up to multiple VCF contacts at one time. There is no need to download multiple tools to combine VCF contacts. Both technical and non-technical users can also use the tool to consolidate VCF contacts. There is no need for technical knowledge to join VCF contacts. Get the latest free trial edition of this software to learn more about its features.
Read More: https://www.softaken.com/merge-vcard-pro

item.title: MSSQL To MySQL Converter ex [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MSSQL To MySQL Converter ex [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
MSSQL To MySQL Converter ex
(Utilities)
MSSQL database migration tool converts complete or selected MS SQL database table row column records into MySQL db server records and retain data types, attributes, primary, null and default values, unique and foreign key constraints, triggers, entities, indexes and properties. Database conversion application provides facility to overwrite the existing database with the converted db or to save the new database at user specified location for the future reference and provides Unicode architecture and multilingual support. Read only and non destructive mode supporting Microsoft SQL to MySQL db migration software maintains data integrity, synchronization, reliability and security features of the database. MS SQL db converter application prevents data loss during migration process and provides GUI look that is graphical user interface for the help and support of users. Database migration program works in a systematic manner and it is cost effective as well as efficient and does not require any special or extra technical skills for the software operation. Db migration application is easily compatible with windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7 and provides install and uninstall support. Microsoft SQL database conversion software contains internal help manuals and guides for the help, convenience and support of users.MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software Features:*Microsoft SQL to MySQL db conversion utility provides support to all latest major versions of MSSQL database server.*MS SQL to MySQL database converter application is compatible with windows11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7 operating systems.*MSSQL database migration tool provides facility to save the converted database either with the existing one or at user specified location for the future reference.*Microsoft SQL database conversion software prevents data loss during migration process.

[read more]
